items.page_title: 2026 Technical Short Course: InSAR Processing and Theory using GMTSAR | EarthScope Consortium
items.text_preview: July 20-22, and August 7 Location: Virtual Deadline: June 12, 2026 APPLICATIONS ARE NOW CLOSED Course Description: This course covers the theory and application of repeat-pass synthetic aperture radar interferometry (InSAR) using the GMTSAR software package. Participants will learn foundational SAR/InSAR concepts and work hands-on to generate interferograms from test datasets (including recently available NISAR data) and (optionally) construct deformation time series. Primary Audience: Graduate
